## 📚 Documentation Improvement

### **Documentation Type**
- [ ] User Guide
- [ ] API Documentation
- [ ] Tutorial
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] README
- [ ] Contributing Guide
- [ ] Architecture Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___________

### **Priority Assessment**
- [ ] Critical - Missing essential information
- [ ] High - Major gaps in documentation
- [ ] Medium - Areas need improvement
- [ ] Low - Minor enhancements

### **Current State**

**What documentation needs improvement?**
<!-- Be specific about which documentation -->

**Current Issues:**
<!-- List the problems with current documentation -->
- Issue 1
- Issue 2
- Issue 3

**Impact on Users:**
<!-- How does this affect users? -->

### **Proposed Improvements**

**What needs to be added/changed?**

**User Impact:**
<!-- How will this improve the user experience? -->

**Target Audience:**
- [ ] New users
- [ ] Experienced developers
- [ ] Security researchers
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] Enterprise users

### **Content Plan**

**Sections to Add/Update:**
1. Section 1 - Description
2. Section 2 - Description
3. Section 3 - Description

**Content Outline:**
<!-- Provide a detailed outline of the proposed content -->

**Key Points to Cover:**
- Point 1
- Point 2
- Point 3

**Code Examples Needed:**

- Where will this documentation live?
- How will it be integrated with existing docs?
- Cross-references needed?

**Accessibility:**

**Review Process:**

**Maintenance Plan:**

- [ ] Test instructions are accurate

### **Success Metrics**

**How will we measure success?**
- User feedback scores
- Reduction in support questions
- Documentation usage analytics
- Contributor onboarding time

**Measurable Outcomes:**
- Outcome 1: <!-- e.g., 50% reduction in basic questions -->
- Outcome 2: <!-- e.g., 90% user satisfaction with docs -->
- Outcome 3: <!-- e.g., Faster contributor onboarding -->

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have read the contribution guidelines
- [ ] I have identified specific documentation gaps
- [ ] I have proposed concrete improvements
- [ ] I have considered the target audience
- [ ] I have planned examples and code samples
- [ ] I have estimated the work required
- [ ] I am available to create this documentation

---

**Thank you for improving our documentation! Better documentation helps everyone in the Stellar ecosystem. 📚**
